title: Impersonate user feature
excerpt: Would be nice, if you could impersonate other users, as an admin; for demo and testing purposes

posts.author: Jakobre (Jakob)
posts.cookedHtml: Would be nice, if you could impersonate other users, as an admin; for demo and testing purposes

posts.author: Stereo (Gregg Dolby)
posts.cookedHtml:
YES!

I agree this would be incredibly useful. Having recently implemented HALO PSA where this is possible it was an essential tool in adjusting and testing permissions and functionality, as well as troubleshooting user issues.

There is another duplicate request here in the community but I am not allowed to link to it
